Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14001 0 0}Hey, you're {f 4 2}-kun, right? It's nice to meet you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}You know, there are a lot of cute girls at this school. I've already asked many of them out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14030 0 0}I'll make sure we have a great time while we're there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14021 0 0}Kirijo-san wasn't very receptive when I asked her out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}What did I do wrong? Maybe I should've suggested a different restaurant...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}She seems like a tough nut to crack...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14002 0 0}Tomorrow, we leave for our trip. I can't wait.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14002 0 0}That trip was a blast. Especially the hot springs...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oops, sorry. That was supposed to be a secret, wasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}But sharing secrets is fun, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14024 0 0}Did something happen to Junpei-kun? He seems kinda down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 3 -1 -1 0 0}It's hard to see him like that. I hope he bounces back soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14023 0 0}It seems like Aigis-san has been staring at me a lot lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}I hope she's not going to embarrass me again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14001 0 0}Did you know the hot spring here is really famous?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}Every few hours, there's a surprise. *chuckle*[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14002 0 0}I hear there's a place somewhere around here where you can dress up like a geisha.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I should take Yukari-san and Aigis there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 155 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14030 0 0}Beautiful scenery, beautiful women... Kyoto is the place to be.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 155 -1 0 0}"A friend in need is a friend indeed."[n]{f 1 1}
